title: Tao Te Ching
author: Lao Tzu
content: “He who knows others is wise; he who knows himself is enlightened.”

title: The Art of War
author: Sun Tzu
content: “To secure ourselves against defeat lies in our own hands, but the opportunity of defeating the enemy is provided by the enemy himself.”

title: Zhuangzi
author: Zhuang Zhou
content: “Do not worry about being useful. Worry about being authentic.”

title: The Analects
author: Confucius
content: “By three methods we may learn wisdom: First, by reflection, which is noblest; Second, by imitation, which is easiest; and third by experience, which is the bitterest.”

title: Huainanzi
author: Liu An
content: “Those who have the wisdom to discern the subtle often see the outcome before it begins.”
